image.alt: Joon Hair in Santa Rosa, CA

sections.heading: About Joon Hair
body: Welcome to Joon Hair, a beautiful salon in the heart of historic downtown Santa Rosa. Our name “Joon”, is a Persian term of endearment meaning “soul” and “beloved” — a reflection of the warmth and care we bring to each of our guests.

Owned by a wife-wife duo with Persian Ancestry, Joon was created to be a luxury salon with an open and welcoming spirit. Our team includes some of Sonoma county’s most talented stylists, all highly skilled ad dedicated to their craft. From Precision cuts to custom color and transformative treatments, we’re here to celebrate your unique beauty.

sections.heading: Work with Joon Hair
sections.body: Find us at 205 5th ST Santa Rosa, CA 95401 United States. Call (707) 575-1474 — we’re glad to help.
